{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Malachi's tower
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Leah]] was rescued from [[Malachi's tower]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
